query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_vendedores,
  SUM(CASE WHEN percentual >= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bateram_meta,
  SUM(CASE WHEN percentual >= 80 AND percentual < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as faixa_80_99,
  SUM(CASE WHEN percentual >= 60 AND percentual < 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as faixa_60_79,
  SUM(CASE WHEN percentual < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as abaixo_60,
  AVG(percentual) as percentual_medio,
  SUM(meta_reais) as meta_total,
  SUM(vendido_reais) as vendido_total
FROM (
  SELECT 
    v.nome,
    mt.metaTrimestral / 100 as meta_reais,
    COALESCE(SUM(vd.valorTotal), 0) / 100 as vendido_reais,
    CASE 
      WHEN mt.metaTrimestral > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(vd.valorTotal), 0) / mt.metaTrimestral) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0 
    END as percentual
  FROM vendedores v
  LEFT JOIN metas_trimestrais mt ON v.id = mt.vendedorId AND mt.trimestre = 'Meta Trimestral 4'
  LEFT JOIN vendas_diarias vd ON v.id = vd.vendedorId 
    AND vd.dataVenda >= '2025-09-01' 
    AND vd.dataVenda <= '2025-11-30'
  WHERE mt.metaTrimestral > 0
  GROUP BY v.id, v.nome, mt.metaTrimestral
) as stats;

  SUM(CASE WHEN percentual < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as abaixo_60,
  AVG(percentual) as percentual_medio,
  SUM(meta_reais) as meta_total,
  SUM(vendido_reais) as vendido_total
FROM (
  SELECT 
    v.nome,
    mt.metaTrimestral / 100 as meta_reais,
    COALESCE(SUM(vd.valorTotal), 0) / 100 as vendido_reais,
    CASE 
      WHEN mt.metaTrimestral > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(vd.valorTotal), 0) / mt.metaTrimestral) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0 
    END as percentual
  FROM vendedores v
  LEFT JOIN metas_trimestrais mt ON v.id = mt.vendedorId AND mt.trimestre = 'Meta Trimestral 4'
  LEFT JOIN vendas_diarias vd ON v.id = vd.vendedorId 
    AND vd.dataVenda >= '2025-09-01' 
    AND vd.dataVenda <= '2025-11-30'
  WHERE mt.metaTrimestral > 0
  GROUP BY v.id, v.nome, mt.metaTrimestral
) as stats;
